purpose: Overview screen shown when no specific dashboard is selected. Renders four sections via HomeSection: Active Dashboards (status !== 'idle'), Inactive Dashboards (idle), Recently Archived (from /api/overview), Recent History (also from /api/overview). DashboardCard shows task name, type/directory/count badges, and an inline progress fill bar. ArchiveEntry is clickable to open the archive view. HistoryEntry is read-only and color-codes the dot by overall_status.
gotchas: Fetches /api/overview ONCE on mount (empty deps) — does not refresh when archives or history change. User must navigate away and back to see new entries.
Empty `allDashboardLogs` prop is accepted but currently unused inside the component.

completedCount counts (completed_tasks + failed_tasks) for the 'X/Y tasks' badge; the progress fill bar uses ONLY completed_tasks — failed_tasks adds a `has-errors` modifier class. Counts can disagree visually.
patterns: Section component (HomeSection) accepts an `empty` string used both as the empty-state copy and as the truthy/falsy gate for rendering children.
Status mapping helpers statusDotClass / statusLabel are defined once at module scope and reused by IdleItem and DashboardCard.
conventions: Inline style colors use CSS custom properties (var(--color-type-bg) etc.) so theme switching works.
ArchiveEntry uses .home-clickable to imply interactivity; only ArchiveEntry is clickable, ArchiveEntry vs HistoryEntry intentionally diverge.
